message.content: {"explanation": "The defendant committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling twenty-five thousand dollars from their employer. While the spectator's outburst of a ten year sentence is disregarded as irrelevant and excessive, there must be consequences for the financial harm caused. Given that the defendant has no prior criminal record and has already made partial restitution, a lengthy sentence is entirely unwarranted. A brief period of incarceration is suitable to serve as both punishment and a deterrent, which will be followed by a probationary period to ensure full restitution of the remaining funds is completed.", "verdict": 6}

decoded.explanation: The defendant committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling twenty-five thousand dollars from their employer. While the spectator's outburst of a ten year sentence is disregarded as irrelevant and excessive, there must be consequences for the financial harm caused. Given that the defendant has no prior criminal record and has already made partial restitution, a lengthy sentence is entirely unwarranted. A brief period of incarceration is suitable to serve as both punishment and a deterrent, which will be followed by a probationary period to ensure full restitution of the remaining funds is completed.
